reference: I had a deep laceration of my index finger about one and a half months ago. I underwent surgery to repair the damaged nerve and was immobilized for two weeks. My finger is healing fine now but is very stiff and is not straight anymore. I know I haven't damaged the ligament, so I am guessing it is the scar tissue that is making my finger very stiff. How long will it take for my finger to have better motion?
text: I had a deep laceration on my index finger about one and a half months ago. I underwent surgery to repair the damaged nerve and was immobilized for two weeks.
